messages.content: Send an email to alice@example.com with subject 'Project Update' summarising that the backend migration is 80% complete and on track for Friday delivery.

arguments.subject: Project Update
arguments.body:
Hi Alice,

I wanted to share a quick update on the backend migration. We are currently 80% complete, and everything is on track for delivery this Friday.

I'll keep you posted as we approach the final stages. Please let me know if you have any questions.

Best regards

content.delta: The email has been sent successfully to **alice@example.com** with the subject **"Project Update"**. The message summarizes that the backend migration is 80% complete and on track for Friday delivery.
